text: I feel strangely unsettled by the contrast between the tranquility outside and the explosion of color and information within these walls. The apologetic tone about the noise, juxtaposed with this almost sterile silence, lingers in my mind. Here, surrounded by messages of research and development, I am keenly aware of how easily perception can be shaped, redirected, or even confused. My thoughts tumble between the quiet order of the police quarters and the vibrant uncertainty of this interior—caught between worlds, I am both observer and participant in their overlap.
